race.comment: WINNING ALL ROUND (9) trialled well here and then was first past the post over 1400m at Balaklava on debut, relegated to second due to alleged interference. Will be fitter and despite the awkward gate he can make amends. SAYERSITISN'TSO (7) resumes for a smart stable and just missed in a recent 1000m trial at Balaklava. Has a low barrier and Toeroek stays aboard. He had no luck in his brief Maiden preparation and a bold return is likely. MANDARIN (10) resumed over 1420m at Naracoorte, beaten a half length. Finally has a low gate and the improved mare has each-way claims. THE BLACK HARP (8) debuts for a leading yard and has been well educated. Pannell has a wide barrier to manage but he deserves a betting watch regardless.
